title: vandellia multiflora
intro: Vandellia multiflora is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia and Australia, characterized by its woody stem and small, white flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Its health benefits include treating wounds, abscesses, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. Vandellia multiflora is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be applied topically to the affected area.
